theme.description: Warm and traditional yet modern and minimalist. Evokes heritage, agriculture, and nature.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-[#E8E2D9]/50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-hover transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold
buttons.secondary: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold
buttons.accent: bg-accent-terracotta text-white hover:bg-opacity-90 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group hover:-translate-y-1

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Relative full-width container (h-[90vh] min-h-[600px]) with background image. Overlay: bg-black/40. Content vertically centered.

content.title: Suchi Farm
content.subtitle: Nurturing Heritage, Cultivating Purity
content.description: A family legacy of premium silk cocoon production, ethical fishery, and sustainable aquaculture.

sections.name: About
sections.layout: Split asymmetric grid (md:grid-cols-12). Left side (col-span-5) text with earthy overline. Right side (col-span-6 col-start-7) tall rounded image.

sections.name: Services
sections.layout: 3-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8). Cards with top image, icon, and text.

items.title: Silk Cocoon Production
items.description: Premium sericulture yielding high-quality silk threads through traditional and sustainable mulberry farming.

items.title: Fishery
items.description: Responsible fish farming providing fresh, healthy, and ethically raised fish for local communities.

items.title: Aquaculture
items.description: Modern aquatic farming techniques integrated with natural ecosystems for sustainable water resource management.

sections.name: Gallery
sections.layout: Bento grid (Tetris mode) mixing square and tall spans for visual interest.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Carousel/Swiper showing 1.5 to 3 cards depending on viewport. Minimal cards with large serif quotes.
quotes: The finest silk cocoons we've ever sourced. Suchi Farm's dedication to quality is unmatched.
Their aquaculture practices are a model for sustainability. Always fresh and reliable.

sections.name: Contact
sections.layout: Two columns. Left: Contact details (Phone, Email, Hours) & 'Get Directions' CTA. Right: Embedded Google Maps iframe.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section) styled with Tailwind for the marketing layouts. Avoid Shadcn Cards if they restrict layout fluidity.
Implement Lucide React icons for the services section.
Ensure the Get Directions buttons link strictly to the provided URL: https://maps.app.goo.gl/81Z4HTzcm4U78QpP6?g_st=ic.
Apply custom fonts via Google Fonts in index.css. Headings MUST be Cormorant Garamond, and body MUST be Manrope.
For the hero overlay, use bg-black/40 over the image to maintain text readability while letting the image breathe.
Use pure functional components in .js extensions.
Every interactive element and key text area MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
